headline: International Paper to Acquire North Pacific Paper Company
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC), a leader in sustainable packaging solutions, has entered into an agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC), a portfolio company of One Rock Capital Partners, for $360MM.

headline: International Paper Buys Major US Paper Mill In $360 Million Deal
summary: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Co. for $360MM. The deal expands IP's West Coast reach and recycled containerboard output.
